chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 948 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of post-arrest bail 1. For orders on MA No.7328/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For hearing of post-arrest bail 19.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ali Dayo, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Ali Napar, Advocate for applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2 & 3. Learned Counsel for the applicant requires withdrawal of the bail application as not pressed. Same is also required by way of statement in writing. Application stands disposed of as not pressed. J U D G E Abdul Basit
